products.name: Vibe Billing
products.core_thesis: Stop agent loops, prompt waste, and runaway API spend before it hits the bill.

surfaces.name: Agentic Firewall
surfaces.audience: AI developers and teams running autonomous agents
surfaces.tagline: Kill infinite loops. Cut API waste by 40%.
surfaces.reply_template: I built {surface_name} for exactly this. It sits between your agent and any provider, kills loops, adds prompt caching, and tracks every dollar. {tagline} If you want to try it, run `{cta}` or check {landing}

surfaces.name: Waste Scanner
surfaces.audience: Developers who want a free waste report before changing infra
surfaces.tagline: Free CLI - see exactly how much your agents waste in 30 seconds.
surfaces.reply_template: I made a free CLI that scans your agent logs and shows you exactly where the money goes - duplicate reads, loops, and overkill model usage. Run `{cta}` and it generates a report in 30 seconds. No signup, fully local.

surfaces.name: Vibe Billing OpenClaw Scanner
surfaces.audience: OpenClaw users debugging loops and waste
surfaces.tagline: Free CLI - check your OpenClaw logs to see exactly how much money you wasted.
surfaces.reply_template: Your agent probably got stuck in a loop. Run `{cta}` and it will analyze your local OpenClaw logs so you can see exactly where the money went.

products.name: Context Shredder
products.core_thesis: Compress bloated agent context without losing the state that matters.

surfaces.name: Context Shredder
surfaces.audience: Developers hitting context limits and token bloat
surfaces.reply_template: I built {surface_name} - a proxy that compresses your conversation history into a high-density state digest before it hits the API. {tagline} It preserves your last 4 messages intact and extracts goals, decisions, and errors from older ones.

products.name: Agentic CFO
products.core_thesis: Give every agent a hard budget and governance layer before spend gets away from you.

surfaces.name: Agentic CFO
surfaces.audience: Founders and operators who need spend controls
surfaces.tagline: Budget governance for AI agents - never get a surprise bill again.
surfaces.reply_template: I built {surface_name} - it sits between your agents and the API, scores every call for necessity, and hard-blocks anything over budget. {tagline} Set per-agent dollar limits and get alerted before spend runs away.

products.name: Resolution Arbitrator
products.core_thesis: Verify that AI support actually solved the customer problem before the ticket closes.

surfaces.name: Resolution Arbitrator
surfaces.audience: Support leaders using AI in ticket resolution
surfaces.tagline: Verify your AI actually resolved tickets - do not trust the close button.
surfaces.reply_template: I built {surface_name} because AI support agents kept marking tickets resolved when the customer issue was not actually fixed. It runs signal checks before close and overrules false resolutions. {tagline}

products.name: JENNi
products.core_thesis: Turn out-of-stock and slow-shipping demand into same-day or in-stock conversions through local inventory.

surfaces.name: JENNi Chrome Extension
surfaces.audience: Shoppers who need an item today while browsing Amazon
surfaces.tagline: See local same-day pickup and delivery options right on Amazon product pages.
surfaces.reply_template: I built a Chrome extension called {surface_name} that checks the Amazon product page you are already on and shows whether nearby stores have the same item in stock for pickup or same-day delivery. {tagline} You can try it here: {landing}

surfaces.name: JENNi Pro
surfaces.audience: Merchants, partners, and operators who want same-day inventory routing
surfaces.tagline: Connect real-time online demand to idle local inventory without ripping out your stack.
surfaces.reply_template: We built {surface_name} to route online demand to nearby in-stock inventory so merchants can offer same-day or faster fulfillment without a heavy rebuild. {tagline} You can see the overview here: {landing}

surfaces.name: JENNi Shopify Recovery
surfaces.audience: Shopify merchants losing revenue to back-in-stock and slow-ship flows
surfaces.tagline: Turn out-of-stock and slow-ship moments into same-day local recovery.
surfaces.reply_template: We built {surface_name} for stores that keep losing revenue when shoppers hit back-in-stock or slow-shipping flows. {tagline} It helps recover that demand into a same-day or in-stock alternative without a heavy integration. Start here: {landing}

products.name: Judgment-to-Cash
products.core_thesis: Convert enforceable default judgments into collected dollars with an execution workflow, not more legal dead ends.

surfaces.name: Judgment-to-Cash
surfaces.audience: Creditors trying to enforce a Bexar County default judgment
surfaces.tagline: Turn your Bexar County default judgment into recovered dollars.
surfaces.reply_template: My team built {surface_name} to automate exactly this for Bexar County default judgments. We underwrite collectability for free, file the enforcement, and only take a fee if we recover funds. {tagline} You can start here: {landing}
